meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Red Team Village -Austin Marck - erpwnage Red Team Approach to Targeting SAP
meta.description: The crown jewels are ripe for the taking. ERP systems like SAP are being targeted more than ever and red teams need the tools to demonstrate these threats. We'll demonstrate the TTPs needed to emulate real threats with lateral movement techniques in, out, and between SAP systems.
